title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited:
Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank Advisory Limited!
